sensoryProfile.sight: Seen here only by implication: ordered city, chambers, and the polished seat of elven permanence waiting north of the patrol road.
sensoryProfile.sound: Associated in this chapter with chamber talk, budgets, and the human noise of argument Sylvanas wants to avoid.
sensoryProfile.atmosphere: Political gravity pulling against the open road.

establishedFacts.fact: Silvermoon houses the Convocation chamber Sylvanas is trying to avoid and Lor'themar is forced to face.
It represents formal politics in contrast to the cleaner logic of border work.

eventsHere.event: Lor'themar rides north to brief the Convocation after the border breach.
